International.name: Start of Mardi Gras
International.description: Mardi Gras, also known as Fat Tuesday, is a festive season that occurs before the Christian season of Lent. The start of Mardi Gras is marked by various celebrations, parades, and parties in many parts of the world, particularly in New Orleans, Louisiana. The festivities typically include colorful costumes, music, dancing, and the throwing of beads and other trinkets to the crowds. Mardi Gras is a time for indulgence and merriment before the more somber period of Lent begins.
